hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && { case "$FILE" in *.js|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.ts|*.tsx|*.jsx) node -c "$FILE" 2>&1 || true ;; esac; case "$FILE" in *.css|*.html|*.svg|*.js|*.mjs|*.cjs|*.ts|*.tsx|*.jsx) grep -nE '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}([^0-9a-fA-F]|$)' "$FILE" && echo 'WARNING: hex color found' ;; esac; } || true
